title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 899
raw_text:
procession of mounting growth stages in personal evolution and hence is
essential to negentropy, to life itself. To know is to be: not "I think therefore I
am" but "I learn therefore I am": there is a difference: learning involves the
absorption of negative entropy into oneself from the environment (negentropy
expressed as information). And this, maybe, is the heart of the matter. "I
write, I learn, I evolve and grow; therefore I am." This, for me, is Gnosticism.
Hence this exegesis. It is the very dynamism of my life.
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
